title: crateva adansonii
intro: Crateva adansonii, also known as the Adam's rib or African medlar, is a tropical plant species native to West Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Crateva adansonii include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antivenom to treat snake bites. In traditional medicine, the plant's leaves and roots are used to prepare herbal remedies, including decoctions and infusions.
